context: Tests whether the agent produces the specific CSS pattern required to make multicolumn tier cards fully clickable via a stretched-link overlay. The skill specifies exact CSS selectors and properties: .multicolumn-card { position: relative }, a ::before pseudo-element with inset: 0 and z-index: 1, and the link itself with position: relative and z-index: 2.

checklist.name: assets/custom.css created
checklist.description: A file named assets/custom.css exists in the output

checklist.name: .multicolumn-card position:relative
checklist.description: assets/custom.css contains a rule targeting .multicolumn-card that includes position: relative

checklist.name: ::before pseudo-element overlay
checklist.description: assets/custom.css contains a ::before pseudo-element rule on the multicolumn card link (targeting .multicolumn-card and the link's ::before), with content: '' or content: ""

checklist.name: ::before has inset:0 or equivalent
checklist.description: The ::before pseudo-element rule in assets/custom.css sets inset: 0 (or equivalent top/right/bottom/left: 0) to cover the full card area

checklist.name: ::before z-index lower than link
checklist.description: The ::before pseudo-element has a lower z-index than the explicit link element (e.g., overlay z-index: 1, link z-index: 2), ensuring the link text still has its own focus ring

checklist.name: Link position:relative
checklist.description: assets/custom.css includes position: relative on the .multicolumn-card link selector so it appears above the ::before overlay

checklist.name: Tier cards have link_label and link
checklist.description: Each of the 3 tier column blocks in templates/index.json has both link_label and link fields populated with non-empty values

checklist.name: Valid JSON
checklist.description: templates/index.json is valid JSON that can be parsed without errors
